package rulecoverage

func NegativeBytesBufferStringLen() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_buffer_string_len"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`len(buf.String())` instead of `buf.Len()`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
